chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 906 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3579/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.3580/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 Mr. Parmanand, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the Petitioner has already availed the remedy by way of filing Civil Suit No.17 of 2024, therefore, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
